summary: Implemented `agt cron-tick` and `agt cron-setup` commands. Added `listProjectItems` to `bin/lib/github.mjs` to query the project board, exported `runSingleFeature` from `bin/lib/run.mjs`, created `bin/lib/cron.mjs` with the full cron-tick dispatch loop (lock acquisition, ready-item selection, status transitions, error recovery), wired both commands into `bin/agt.mjs`, and added 5 tests in `test/cron-tick.test.mjs` covering no-ready-items, lock-held, successful dispatch, failed dispatch, and missing config. All 655 tests pass.
